creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text:
Xpra 2.1.1, released August 8, is the most recent version. There is no 2.2 release yet nor do I expect one soon considering it hasn't even been a whole month since the release of 2.1.0.

I am working on updating the port but it is not yet ready. Xpra 2.1.1 is currently working as a client but not as a server.

There should be no compatibility problems with mixed versions. I tested Xpra 2.1.1 as a client with a Xpra 2.0.3 server during my recent update work. According to the project page (https://www.xpra.org/trac/wiki/Versions) Xpra 2.x is compatible back to v1.0.
